evidence: scripts/competitor_scanner.py main() reads sys.argv[1:] as positional URLs only; it never parses --url or --output flags
description: Documented invocation 'python scripts/competitor_scanner.py --url [competitor-url] --output json' does not match the script's actual argument handling and will not collect the intended data
suggested_fix: Update the documented command to 'python scripts/competitor_scanner.py <url1> [url2] [url3] ...' matching the script's actual CLI

evidence: README.md:40 contains 'curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/zubair-trabzada/ai-marketing-claude/main/install.sh | bash'
description: Documented one-command install pipes a remote script directly into bash with no checksum or signature verification
suggested_fix: Offer a download-then-inspect-then-run flow, or publish a checksum/signature alongside the install script

evidence: ctx.check_hostname = False; ctx.verify_mode = ssl.CERT_NONE in fetch_page()
description: TLS certificate verification is disabled for every page fetch, permitting MITM tampering of fetched HTML
suggested_fix: Remove the CERT_NONE override and use ssl.create_default_context() unmodified; catch and report TLS errors instead of silently disabling verification

evidence: ctx.check_hostname = False; ctx.verify_mode = ssl.CERT_NONE in fetch_sitemap()
description: TLS certificate verification is disabled for the sitemap.xml fetch as well
suggested_fix: Remove the CERT_NONE override and use ssl.create_default_context() unmodified

evidence: ctx.check_hostname = False; ctx.verify_mode = ssl.CERT_NONE in fetch_page()
description: TLS certificate verification is disabled for every competitor URL fetch
suggested_fix: Remove the CERT_NONE override and use ssl.create_default_context() unmodified

evidence: requirements.txt:4 reads 'reportlab>=4.0'
description: reportlab dependency has no upper bound, allowing untested future major versions to install
suggested_fix: Pin to a tested range such as reportlab>=4.0,<5.0

evidence: market-report/SKILL.md looks for COMPETITOR-ANALYSIS.md, SOCIAL-AUDIT.md, EMAIL-AUDIT.md, AD-AUDIT.md, CONTENT-AUDIT.md, but sibling skills actually write COMPETITOR-REPORT.md, SOCIAL-CALENDAR.md, EMAIL-SEQUENCES.md, AD-CAMPAIGNS.md respectively, and no skill writes CONTENT-AUDIT.md
description: /market report will never find data from /market competitors, /market social, /market emails, or /market ads because it checks for the wrong filenames
suggested_fix: Update the data-source list to COMPETITOR-REPORT.md, SOCIAL-CALENDAR.md, EMAIL-SEQUENCES.md, AD-CAMPAIGNS.md and drop the nonexistent CONTENT-AUDIT.md

evidence: market-report-pdf/SKILL.md looks for COMPETITOR-ANALYSIS.md, SOCIAL-AUDIT.md, EMAIL-AUDIT.md, AD-AUDIT.md, but sibling skills actually write COMPETITOR-REPORT.md, SOCIAL-CALENDAR.md, EMAIL-SEQUENCES.md, AD-CAMPAIGNS.md respectively
description: /market report-pdf will never find data from /market competitors, /market social, /market emails, or /market ads because it checks for the wrong filenames
suggested_fix: Update the primary data sources list to COMPETITOR-REPORT.md, SOCIAL-CALENDAR.md, EMAIL-SEQUENCES.md, AD-CAMPAIGNS.md
